_comment: Template for adding a new game. See SCHEMA.md for the full rules. Delete this _comment before sending. Do NOT include quest ids (Claude renumbers). Omit 'video' when there is no unique real YouTube link — Claude fills a search URL. Every quest's 'category' value must match a subFilter.options[].value, and every 'title' must be unique within the game.

quests.title: The Opening Gambit
quests.summary: The opening quest that teaches core movement and combat while setting up the central conflict.
quests.aiTip: Explore every room before leaving — the tutorial area hides an easy-to-miss upgrade.
walkthrough: Follow the on-screen prompts out of the starting area.
Defeat the first group of enemies to learn the combat basics.
Speak with the mentor NPC to receive your first ability.
Head to the village to trigger the next quest.

quests.title: A Friend in Need
quests.summary: A companion-focused quest that deepens their backstory and unlocks a personal reward.
quests.aiTip: Bring this companion along in your party for extra dialogue and a better outcome.
walkthrough: Talk to the companion at camp to start the quest.
Travel to the marked location and investigate the scene.
Resolve the confrontation through dialogue or combat.
Return to camp to claim the loyalty reward.

quests.title: Lost and Found
quests.summary: A short fetch-style side quest that rewards exploration of the market district.
quests.aiTip: Check the rooftops — the item you need is often placed somewhere the main path skips.
walkthrough: Accept the request from the merchant.
Search the district for the missing item.
Return the item to the merchant for your reward.
